calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #2, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jan-18-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Steven Weinkauf for Public Administrator. Paul Malone for the Heirs at Law.

Mr. Weinkauf addressed the issues raised in the Examiner's notes with regard to the interest rate paid to the Estate. The Court approved the accounting and distribution (subject to review of the order) at the urging of the Beneficiaries notwithstanding that there was possible additional interest income that could have been available to them. The Court alerted the Public Administrator of its concern about maximization of interest.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Gomez.

Petition To Determine Entitlement
Off Calendar Sep-21-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Steven Weinkauf for Public Administrator. Paul Malone for Aleksandr Malamis (Petitioner).

The Petition to Determine Entitlement will be dismissed upon filing of the dismissal. The Petition to Determine Persons Entitled to Distribution was granted (subject to review/modification of the order) but the request for Modification of the December 2004 Judgment of Distribution was denied.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy C. Garcia.
